creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
First of all rtpproxy does build just fine after having cloned like this:
git clone 'https://github.com/sippy/rtpproxy.git' --recurse-submodules

Therefore following
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/makefiles/#makefile-master_sites-github-multiple
should be possible without creating new ports for satisfying this dependency.
Am I totally wrong about this assumption? If not we should master Porter's handbook 5.4.3. USE_GITHUB here.

Anyone who definitively knows how to USE_GITHUB in port Makefiles?
